public_ip.description: MC host public IP when assign_public_ip is true.

setup_script_path.description: Helper script path on MC host for manual KVM guest setup (cloud_init_setup mode).

setup_script_run_command.description: Command to run on MC host after you manually copy/convert the OVA into qcow2.

name_prefix.description: Hyphenated prefix for OCI display_name fields.

tags.description: Merged freeform tags for oci_* resources.

additional_tags.description: Extra freeform tags merged after standard tags.

environment.description: Deployment slice: dev, staging, prod, or a region/workload label.

include_managed_by_tag.description: Add managed_by = terraform to freeform tags.

namespace.description: Short project or product prefix for names and tags (e.g. kove).

stack_name.description: Logical stack identifier (e.g. rdma-ash, oke-01). Used in default display name prefixes.

assign_public_ip.description: Assign public IP to the MC host.

availability_domain.description: Optional AD override. Empty = first AD in tenancy.

base_image_ocid.description: Optional base image OCID when deployment_mode = cloud_init_setup. Empty = latest Oracle Linux 8 for selected shape.

boot_volume_size_gbs.description: Boot volume size in GB for the MC host.

cloud_init_template_path.description: Optional path to cloud-init template. Empty = module default.

compartment_ocid.description: Compartment where the MC host instance is created.

custom_image_ocid.description: Custom image OCID when deployment_mode = custom_image.

guest_disk_path.description: Default KVM guest qcow2 path used by setup helper script.

guest_memory_mb.description: Default guest memory in MB used by setup helper script.

guest_vcpus.description: Default guest vCPU count used by setup helper script.

guest_vm_name.description: Default KVM guest VM name used by setup helper script.

hostname_label.description: Optional DNS-safe hostname label for the primary VNIC.

kove_namespace.description: Short project prefix for names and tags.

setup_script_path.description: Path where the MC helper script is created on host for cloud_init_setup mode.

ssh_public_key.description: SSH public key injected for opc/cloud-user access.

subnet_id.description: Target subnet OCID for the MC host VNIC.

tenancy_ocid.description: OCI tenancy OCID (used for AD lookup).

availability_domain_used.description: AD used for bastion, management VM, compute cluster, and BMs.

bastion_public_ip.description: Public IP when enable_bastion is true; null otherwise.

bm_console_vnc_connection_strings.description: Console VNC connection strings when create_bm_console_connections is true; same order as bm_instance_ids.

bm_control_private_ip.description: Private IP of the single BM control node (index 0).

bm_instance_ids.description: BM OCIDs in order: index 0 = control, remaining = memory nodes.

bm_memory_private_ips.description: Private IPs of memory nodes only (excludes control).

cluster_network_id.description: RDMA cluster network OCID when rdma_deployment_mode is cluster_network; null otherwise.

cluster_network_instance_ids.description: Cluster-network mode memory-pool instance IDs discovered from oci_core_cluster_network_instances.

cluster_network_instance_private_ips.description: Cluster-network mode memory-pool private IPs discovered from oci_core_instance lookups.

cluster_placement_group_id.description: Cluster Placement Group OCID when cluster_placement_group_enabled is true; null otherwise.

cluster_ssh_private_key_openssh.description: Terraform-generated ED25519 private key (paired with metadata on instances). Use if your primary key is rejected by sshd.

compute_cluster_id.description: BM compute cluster OCID when rdma_deployment_mode is compute_cluster; null otherwise.

existing_vcns_in_compartment.description: Existing VCNs in the compartment grouped by display_name (display_name -> list of OCIDs).

management_private_ip.description: Private IP of the management VM.

management_secondary_vnic_id.description: Secondary VNIC attachment OCID for management node when enabled; null otherwise.

oke_prerequisites.description: Subnet, route tables, and compartment references for stig-hardened-builds/oke-cluster with use_existing_vcn (when this stack created the VCN).

private_route_table_ocid.description: Private (NAT) route table when Terraform created the VCN (for OKE worker subnet). Empty when use_existing_vcn is true.

public_route_table_ocid.description: Public route table when Terraform created the VCN (for attaching OKE API/LB subnets). Empty when use_existing_vcn is true.

rdma_subnet_ocid.description: Private RDMA / BM primary VNIC subnet.

name_prefix.description: Hyphenated prefix for OCI display_name fields.

tags.description: Merged freeform tags for oci_* resources.

additional_tags.description: Extra freeform tags merged after standard tags.

environment.description: Deployment slice: dev, staging, prod, or a region/workload label.

include_managed_by_tag.description: Add managed_by = terraform to freeform tags.

namespace.description: Short project or product prefix for names and tags (e.g. kove).

stack_name.description: Logical stack identifier (e.g. rdma-ash, oke-01). Used in default display name prefixes.

management_subnet_availability_domain.description: AD name for the management subnet.

public_subnet_availability_domain.description: AD name for the public subnet.

rdma_subnet_availability_domain.description: AD name for the RDMA subnet.

constant_value: All .* Services In Oracle Services Network

compartment_id.description: Compartment for VCN and networking resources.

name_prefix.description: Prefix for display_name on all resources (e.g. kove-dev-rdma).

private_subnet_ssh_sources_extras.description: Comma-separated extra CIDRs for SSH to private subnets (in addition to VCN CIDR).

public_ingress_hpc_ui_ports.description: Allow TCP 3000 and 5000 from ssh_ingress_cidr on the public security list.

ssh_ingress_cidr.description: CIDR allowed to SSH (22) and optional HPC UI ports on the public subnet security list.

vcn_cidr_block.description: VCN CIDR. Subnets use /24 at indices 1 (public), 2 (mgmt), 3 (rdma) under a /16-style layout.

availability_domain.description: Single AD for bastion, management VM, compute cluster, and BMs (e.g. pILZ:PHX-AD-2). Empty = derive from rdma subnet (existing VCN) or first tenancy AD.

bastion_image_ocid.description: Optional custom image OCID for bastion; empty = latest Oracle Linux 8 for this shape

bastion_memory_gbs.description: Bastion memory in GB (E6.Flex); matches oke-cluster node_pool_memory_gbs default.

bastion_ocpus.description: Bastion OCPUs (E6.Flex); matches oke-cluster node_pool_ocpus default.

bastion_shape.description: Bastion compute shape (same VM family as stig-hardened-builds/oke-cluster worker node_pool_shape).

bm_generic_platform_config.description: GENERIC_BM platform_config (often must stay false for BM.Optimized3 on compute cluster)

bm_imds_ssh_key_bootstrap.description: First-boot script to copy SSH keys from IMDS to opc/cloud-user/ec2-user (custom RHEL images)

bm_node_image_ocid.description: Custom image OCID for all BM nodes (control + memory)

bm_node_shape.description: Bare metal shape for control and memory nodes (oke-cluster uses VM.Standard.E6.Flex workers only; no BM in OKE node pool).

cloud_init_template_extra_vars.description: Extra string placeholders for your management cloud-init template (e.g. other_api_token). Merged with rhsm_*; all values are treated as sensitive for plan output.

cluster_network_autoscaling_cooldown_sec.description: Cooldown period in seconds between autoscaling actions.

cluster_network_autoscaling_initial_node.description: Initial memory node count used by autoscaling policy capacity block.

cluster_network_autoscaling_max_nodes.description: Maximum memory nodes for cluster-network autoscaling.

cluster_network_autoscaling_min_nodes.description: Minimum memory nodes for cluster-network autoscaling.

cluster_network_autoscaling_scale_in_by.description: Number of memory nodes to remove per scale-in action.

cluster_network_autoscaling_scale_in_thr.description: Scale-in threshold (%) for memory-pool CPU utilization.

cluster_network_autoscaling_scale_out_by.description: Number of memory nodes to add per scale-out action.

cluster_network_autoscaling_scale_out_th.description: Scale-out threshold (%) for memory-pool CPU utilization.

cluster_network_enable_autoscaling.description: Enable OCI autoscaling configuration for the cluster-network memory instance pool.

cluster_placement_group_description.description: CPG description. Empty = generated sentence from name_prefix.

cluster_placement_group_enabled.description: Create oci_cluster_placement_groups_cluster_placement_group and assign each BM to it. Applies before instance create (explicit depends_on). Set false to skip or avoid replacing existing BMs that were created without a CPG.

cluster_placement_group_type.description: OCI cluster placement group type (e.g. STANDARD). Must match your tenancy / workload; see Oracle Cluster Placement Groups docs.

compute_system_name.description: Display-name role label for the RDMA control/orchestrator node.

create_bm_console_connections.description: Create OCI instance console connections for each BM (serial/VNC over SSH tunnel)

enable_bastion.description: Create a small Oracle Linux VM in the public subnet for jump access

enable_management_instance.description: Create the built-in management VM (kove-*-management). Set false when using a separate MC host as the single management node.

existing_management_subnet_id.description: Private subnet for management VM (NAT egress recommended)

existing_public_subnet_id.description: Public subnet for optional bastion (must allow SSH from Internet if bastion enabled)

existing_rdma_subnet_id.description: Private subnet for BM compute cluster (primary VNIC placement)

existing_vcn_id.description: Existing VCN OCID (informational output when using existing subnets)

host_label_prefix.description: Optional DNS-safe prefix for instance hostname labels.

identity_home_region.description: Home region for IAM create/update/delete operations (tenancy home region).

kove_namespace.description: Short project prefix for names and tags (see modules/labels).

kove_stack_name.description: Stack identifier (e.g. rdma-ash). Display names use module.labels.name_prefix = namespace-environment-stack_name.

management_cloud_init_template_path.description: Optional path to a cloud-init template. Empty = cloud_init/kove-rdma-cloud-init-standalone-runtime.txt. Secrets via rhsm_* and secrets.auto.tfvars. On Windows prefer forward slashes.

management_image_ocid.description: Optional custom image; empty = latest Oracle Linux 8

management_secondary_vnic_enabled.description: Attach a secondary VNIC to the management controller.

management_secondary_vnic_private_ip.description: Optional fixed private IP for the management secondary VNIC.

management_secondary_vnic_subnet_id.description: Optional subnet OCID for the management secondary VNIC. Empty defaults to the RDMA subnet.

management_shape.description: Same VM shape as oke-cluster workers by default (VM.Standard.E6.Flex).

memory_node_count.description: Number of BM.Optimized3 memory nodes (default 2 → 3 BM instances total with 1 control). Control node is always 1.

playbooks_zip_url.description: Optional HTTPS URL for playbooks.zip (injected into kove-rdma cloud-init). Empty skips download.

private_subnet_ssh_sources_extras.description: Comma-separated CIDRs allowed SSH to private subnets in addition to VCN CIDR (when Terraform creates security lists)

public_ingress_hpc_ui_ports.description: When creating the VCN: allow TCP 3000 and 5000 from ssh_ingress_cidr on the public subnet (oci-hpc public security list).

rdma_deployment_mode.description: RDMA deployment mode: compute_cluster (individual BM instances in a compute cluster) or cluster_network (OCI cluster network instance pool).

rhsm_activation_key.description: RHSM activation key; injected as rhsm_activation_key. Leave empty if unused.

rhsm_org_id.description: RHSM organization ID; injected into cloud-init template as rhsm_org_id. Leave empty if unused.

ssh_ingress_cidr.description: CIDR for TCP 22 (and optional 3000/5000) on the **public** subnet when Terraform creates the VCN — same role as oci-hpc `ssh_cidr`.

ssh_public_key.description: SSH public key for opc on VMs and combined with generated key on BMs

tags.description: Freeform tags applied to major resources

use_compute_agent.description: Oracle Cloud Agent HPC RDMA plugins on BMs

use_existing_vcn.description: false = create VCN with public + management + RDMA subnets; true = supply subnet OCIDs

vcn_cidr_block.description: VCN CIDR when creating a new VCN. Subnets: /24 at indices 1 (public), 2 (mgmt), 3 (rdma).

xpd_name.description: Display-name role label for RDMA memory nodes.

availability_domain.description: Single AD for bastion, management VM, compute cluster, and BMs (e.g. pILZ:PHX-AD-2). Empty = derive from rdma subnet (existing VCN) or first tenancy AD.

bastion_image_ocid.description: Optional custom image OCID for bastion; empty = latest Oracle Linux 8 for this shape

bastion_memory_gbs.description: Bastion memory in GB (E6.Flex); matches oke-cluster node_pool_memory_gbs default.

bastion_ocpus.description: Bastion OCPUs (E6.Flex); matches oke-cluster node_pool_ocpus default.

bastion_shape.description: Bastion compute shape (same VM family as stig-hardened-builds/oke-cluster worker node_pool_shape).

bm_generic_platform_config.description: GENERIC_BM platform_config (often must stay false for BM.Optimized3 on compute cluster)

bm_imds_ssh_key_bootstrap.description: First-boot script to copy SSH keys from IMDS to opc/cloud-user/ec2-user (custom RHEL images)

bm_node_image_ocid.description: Custom image OCID for all BM nodes (control + memory)

bm_node_shape.description: Bare metal shape for control and memory nodes (oke-cluster uses VM.Standard.E6.Flex workers only; no BM in OKE node pool).

cloud_init_template_extra_vars.description: Extra string placeholders for your management cloud-init template (e.g. other_api_token). Merged with rhsm_*; all values are treated as sensitive for plan output.

cluster_network_autoscaling_initial_node.description: Initial memory node count for autoscaling policy capacity.

cluster_network_autoscaling_max_nodes.description: Maximum memory nodes in autoscaling configuration.

cluster_network_autoscaling_min_nodes.description: Minimum memory nodes in autoscaling configuration.

cluster_network_autoscaling_scale_in_by.description: Number of nodes to remove per scale-in action.

cluster_network_autoscaling_scale_out_by.description: Number of nodes to add per scale-out action.

cluster_network_enable_autoscaling.description: Enable OCI autoscaling for cluster-network memory pool.

cluster_placement_group_description.description: CPG description. Empty = generated sentence from name_prefix.

cluster_placement_group_enabled.description: Create oci_cluster_placement_groups_cluster_placement_group and assign each BM to it. Applies before instance create (explicit depends_on). Set false to skip or avoid replacing existing BMs that were created without a CPG.

cluster_placement_group_type.description: OCI cluster placement group type (e.g. STANDARD). Must match your tenancy / workload; see Oracle Cluster Placement Groups docs.

compute_system_name.description: Role label for RDMA control/orchestrator resources.

create_bm_console_connections.description: Create OCI instance console connections for each BM (serial/VNC over SSH tunnel)

enable_bastion.description: Create a small Oracle Linux VM in the public subnet for jump access

enable_management_instance.description: Create rdma_platform built-in management VM. Set false when MC host should be the only management node.

enable_mc_instance.description: Create a dedicated MC KVM host VM.

existing_management_subnet_id.description: Private subnet for management VM (NAT egress recommended)

existing_public_subnet_id.description: Public subnet for optional bastion (must allow SSH from Internet if bastion enabled)

existing_rdma_subnet_id.description: Private subnet for BM compute cluster (primary VNIC placement)

existing_vcn_id.description: Existing VCN OCID (informational output when using existing subnets)

host_label_prefix.description: Optional DNS-safe prefix for instance hostname labels.

identity_home_region.description: Home region for IAM create/update/delete operations (tenancy home region).

kove_namespace.description: Short project prefix for names and tags (see modules/labels).

kove_stack_name.description: Stack identifier (e.g. rdma-ash). Display names use module.labels.name_prefix = namespace-environment-stack_name.

management_cloud_init_template_path.description: Optional path to a cloud-init template. Empty = cloud_init/kove-rdma-cloud-init-standalone-runtime.txt. Secrets via rhsm_* and secrets.auto.tfvars. On Windows prefer forward slashes.

management_image_ocid.description: Optional custom image; empty = latest Oracle Linux 8

management_secondary_vnic_enabled.description: Attach a secondary VNIC to the management controller.

management_secondary_vnic_private_ip.description: Optional fixed private IP for the management secondary VNIC.

management_secondary_vnic_subnet_id.description: Optional subnet OCID for the management secondary VNIC. Empty defaults to the RDMA subnet.

management_shape.description: Same VM shape as oke-cluster workers by default (VM.Standard.E6.Flex).

mc_assign_public_ip.description: Assign public IP to MC host primary VNIC.

mc_availability_domain.description: Optional AD override for MC host. Empty = availability_domain_used from rdma_platform module.

mc_base_image_ocid.description: Optional base image OCID used when mc_deployment_mode = cloud_init_setup. Empty = latest Oracle Linux 8 for mc_shape.

mc_boot_volume_size_gbs.description: MC host boot volume size in GB.

mc_cloud_init_template_path.description: Optional custom cloud-init template path for MC host cloud_init_setup mode.

mc_custom_image_ocid.description: Custom image OCID used when mc_deployment_mode = custom_image.

mc_deployment_mode.description: MC deployment mode: custom_image or cloud_init_setup.

mc_guest_disk_path.description: Default qcow2 path used by the MC setup helper script.

mc_guest_memory_mb.description: Default guest memory (MB) used by the MC setup helper script.

mc_guest_vcpus.description: Default guest vCPUs used by the MC setup helper script.

mc_guest_vm_name.description: Default KVM guest domain name used by the MC setup helper script.

mc_hostname_label.description: Optional hostname label for MC host primary VNIC.

mc_instance_name_suffix.description: Display name suffix for MC host.

mc_setup_script_path.description: Path created on the MC host for the post-cloud-init KVM setup helper script.

mc_subnet_id.description: Optional subnet OCID for the MC host. Empty = management subnet from rdma_platform module.

memory_node_count.description: Number of BM.Optimized3 memory nodes (default 2 → 3 BM instances total with 1 control). Control node is always 1.

playbooks_zip_url.description: Optional HTTPS URL for playbooks.zip (injected into kove-rdma cloud-init). Empty skips download.

private_subnet_ssh_sources_extras.description: Comma-separated CIDRs allowed SSH to private subnets in addition to VCN CIDR (when Terraform creates security lists)

public_ingress_hpc_ui_ports.description: When creating the VCN: allow TCP 3000 and 5000 from ssh_ingress_cidr on the public subnet (oci-hpc public security list).

rdma_deployment_mode.description: RDMA deployment mode: compute_cluster (individual BM instances in a compute cluster) or cluster_network (OCI cluster network instance pool).

rhsm_activation_key.description: RHSM activation key; injected as rhsm_activation_key. Leave empty if unused.

rhsm_org_id.description: RHSM organization ID; injected into cloud-init template as rhsm_org_id. Leave empty if unused.

ssh_ingress_cidr.description: CIDR for TCP 22 (and optional 3000/5000) on the **public** subnet when Terraform creates the VCN — same role as oci-hpc `ssh_cidr`.

ssh_public_key.description: SSH public key for opc on VMs and combined with generated key on BMs

tags.description: Freeform tags applied to major resources

use_compute_agent.description: Oracle Cloud Agent HPC RDMA plugins on BMs

use_existing_vcn.description: false = create VCN with public + management + RDMA subnets; true = supply subnet OCIDs

vcn_cidr_block.description: VCN CIDR when creating a new VCN. Subnets: /24 at indices 1 (public), 2 (mgmt), 3 (rdma).

xpd_name.description: Role label for RDMA memory node resources.
